title: delphinium elatum subsp. cryophilum
intro: Delphinium elatum subsp. cryophilum, commonly known as the mountain delphinium, is a subspecies of the delphinium elatum plant, a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. Delphinium elatum subsp. cryophilum is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural pain reliever. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, have been used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
